issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Templated per-customer detail page from PostgreSQL
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses pages/[param].md routing with ${params.x} in SQL fences, a sources/<name>/connection.yaml for postgres, and components like DataTable/LineChart with the documented prop shape; baseline writes generic SQL/HTML without Evidence's file conventions.

scenarios.name: Cohort retention dashboard with interactive filters
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses named sql blocks (```sql cohort_data), Dropdown with DropdownOption value/valueLabel, ${inputs.x.value} parameters, and the Heatmap/BigValue components per the skill; baseline lacks Evidence's input syntax and component names.
